new_cascade_issues.title: Power margin reduction
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces power generation capacity, potentially exceeding peak power consumption limits during imaging mode.

new_cascade_issues.title: Mass margin increase
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces total payload mass, increasing the mass margin but potentially affecting structural dynamics.

new_cascade_issues.title: Thermal margin impact
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel may affect thermal balance and stability, potentially impacting ΔT across orbital cycles.

new_missing_tests.activity: Thermal balance test to validate TMM with right solar panel removed
new_missing_tests.reason: To ensure thermal stability after removing the right solar panel
